classification.task_goal: Structure User and Card classes in C# to meet specified requirements.
primary_constraints: Each User can have multiple Cards.
A Card can be used by multiple Users.
Each Card has a unique Id.
Each User has a unique Id.
UsageTimestamp must not be in the Card class.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially included a UsageTimestamp in the Card class, which violated the user's constraint. The user pointed this out, and the AI subsequently repaired the structure by creating a separate CardUsage class to handle usage events, thus enforcing the constraint afterward.
